name: Amotiv Limited
analysis: AOV's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 34% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.3× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$6.3500, stop A$5.9697, target A$7.0000 (1.71:1) — then trail it.
